stemHtml: Which of the following extracts of weather reports could be, in accordance with the regulations, abbreviated to "CAVOK"? (MSA minus airport elevation equals: LSZB 15000 ft, LSZH 8000 ft, LSGG 10000 ft, LSZG 7000 ft)

options.b: LSGG 22003KT 9999 SCT120 BKN280 09/08 Q1026 BECMG 5000 BR=
options.d: LSZH 26024G52KT 9999 BKN060 17/14 Q1012 RETS TEMPO 5000 TSRA=
